lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਰਸਾਇਨ ਪੀਓ ਰੇ ਦਗਰਾ ॥੩॥੪॥
lines.translit: raam rasaaein peeo re dagaraa |3|4|
lines.english: Drink in the sublime elixir of the Lord, O deceitful one. ||3||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਜਿ ਚੀਨੑਸੀ ਆਸਾ ਤੇ ਨ ਭਾਵਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham ji cheenasee aasaa te na bhaavasee |
lines.english: One who recognizes the Supreme Lord God, dislikes other desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa |
lines.english: Aasaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੈਸੇ ਮਨ ਤਰਹਿਗਾ ਰੇ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਬਿਖੈ ਕੋ ਬਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaise man tarahigaa re sansaar saagar bikhai ko banaa |
lines.english: O my mind, how will you cross over the world-ocean, if you are filled with the water of corruption?

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਾ ਭਗਤਹ ਚੇਤੀਅਲੇ ਅਚਿੰਤ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਖਸੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raamaa bhagatah cheteeale achint man raakhasee |1|
lines.english: He focuses his consciousness on the Lord's devotional worship, and keeps his mind free of anxiety. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੀਪੇ ਕੇ ਘਰਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਦੈਲਾ ਗੁਰ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਭੈਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: chheepe ke ghar janam dailaa gur upades bhailaa |
lines.english: You have given me birth in the house of a calico-printer, but I have found the Teachings of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਦੇਖਿ ਕੈ ਭੂਲਾ ਰੇ ਮਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jhootthee maaeaa dekh kai bhoolaa re manaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Gazing upon the falseness of Maya, you have gone astray, O my mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਹ ਕੈ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਹਰਿ ਭੇਟੁਲਾ ॥੨॥੫॥
lines.translit: santah kai parasaad naamaa har bhettulaa |2|5|
lines.english: By the Grace of the Saint, Naam Dayv has met the Lord. ||2||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਬਾਣੀ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa baanee sree ravidaas jeeo kee |
lines.english: Aasaa, The Word Of The Reverend Ravi Daas Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਦੋਖ ਅਸਾਧ ਜਾ ਮਹਿ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਕੇਤਕ ਆਸ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: panch dokh asaadh jaa meh taa kee ketak aas |1|
lines.english: So the one who is filled with the five incurable vices - what hope is there for him? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮ੍ਰਿਗ ਮੀਨ ਭ੍ਰਿੰਗ ਪਤੰਗ ਕੁੰਚਰ ਏਕ ਦੋਖ ਬਿਨਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: mrig meen bhring patang kunchar ek dokh binaas |
lines.english: The deer, the fish, the bumble bee, the moth and the elephant are destroyed, each for a single defect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਗਦ ਜੋਨਿ ਅਚੇਤ ਸੰਭਵ ਪੁੰਨ ਪਾਪ ਅਸੋਚ ॥
lines.translit: trigad jon achet sanbhav pun paap asoch |
lines.english: The creeping creatures live thoughtless lives, and cannot discriminate between good and evil.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਬੇਕ ਦੀਪ ਮਲੀਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bibek deep maleen |1| rahaau |
lines.english: His lamp of clear wisdom has grown dim. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਧੋ ਅਬਿਦਿਆ ਹਿਤ ਕੀਨ ॥
lines.translit: maadho abidiaa hit keen |
lines.english: O Lord, he is in love with ignorance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਜਹਾ ਜਹਾ ਲਗੁ ਕਰਮ ਕੇ ਬਸਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant jahaa jahaa lag karam ke bas jaae |
lines.english: Wherever the beings and creatures are, they are born according to the karma of their past actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨੁਖਾ ਅਵਤਾਰ ਦੁਲਭ ਤਿਹੀ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਪੋਚ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: maanukhaa avataar dulabh tihee sangat poch |2|
lines.english: It is so difficult to obtain this human incarnation, and yet, they keep company with the low. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਦਾਸ ਉਦਾਸ ਤਜੁ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਤਪਨ ਤਪੁ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨ ॥
lines.translit: ravidaas daas udaas taj bhram tapan tap gur giaan |
lines.english: O servant Ravi Daas, dispel your sorrow and doubt, and know that Guru-given spiritual wisdom is the penance of penances.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲ ਫਾਸ ਅਬਧ ਲਾਗੇ ਕਛੁ ਨ ਚਲੈ ਉਪਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kaal faas abadh laage kachh na chalai upaae |3|
lines.english: The noose of death is unforgiving, and it shall catch them; it cannot be warded off. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa |
lines.english: Aasaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਜਨ ਭੈ ਹਰਨ ਪਰਮਾਨੰਦ ਕਰਹੁ ਨਿਦਾਨ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhagat jan bhai haran paramaanand karahu nidaan |4|1|
lines.english: O Lord, Destroyer of the fears of Your humble devotees, make me supremely blissful in the end. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਤੁਝੀ ਤਨੁ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: sant tujhee tan sangat praan |
lines.english: Your Saints are Your body, and their company is Your breath of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਮਾਝੈ ਦੀਜੈ ਦੇਵਾ ਦੇਵ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sant prem maajhai deejai devaa dev |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The sublime essence of the Saints' conversation, and the Love of the Saints. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਚੀ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਸੰਤ ਕਥਾ ਰਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: sant chee sangat sant kathaa ras |
lines.english: O Lord, God of gods, grant me the Society of the Saints,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨ ਜਾਨੈ ਸੰਤ ਦੇਵਾ ਦੇਵ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: satigur giaan jaanai sant devaa dev |1|
lines.english: By the True Guru-given spiritual wisdom, I know the Saints as the gods of gods. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਰ ਇਕ ਮਾਗਉ ਭਗਤਿ ਚਿੰਤਾਮਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: aaur ik maagau bhagat chintaaman |
lines.english: I ask for these, and for one thing more - devotional worship, which shall fulfill my desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਆਚਰਣ ਸੰਤ ਚੋ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਸੰਤ ਚ ਓਲ੍ਹਗ ਓਲ੍ਹਗਣੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sant aacharan sant cho maarag sant ch olhag olhaganee |2|
lines.english: The Character of the Saints, the lifestyle of the Saints, and the service of the servant of the Saints. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਅਨੰਤਹਿ ਅੰਤਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: sant ananteh antar naahee |4|2|
lines.english: there is no difference between the Saints and the Infinite Lord. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਣੀ ਲਖਾਵਹੁ ਅਸੰਤ ਪਾਪੀ ਸਣਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: janee lakhaavahu asant paapee san |3|
lines.english: Do not show me the wicked sinners. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿਦਾਸੁ ਭਣੈ ਜੋ ਜਾਣੈ ਸੋ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: ravidaas bhanai jo jaanai so jaan |
lines.english: Says Ravi Daas, he alone is wise, who knows this:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਚ ਰੂਖ ਤੇ ਊਚ ਭਏ ਹੈ ਗੰਧ ਸੁਗੰਧ ਨਿਵਾਸਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: neech rookh te aooch bhe hai gandh sugandh nivaasaa |1|
lines.english: From a lowly tree, I have become exalted; Your fragrance, Your exquisite fragrance now permeates me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਚੰਦਨ ਹਮ ਇਰੰਡ ਬਾਪੁਰੇ ਸੰਗਿ ਤੁਮਾਰੇ ਬਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: tum chandan ham irandd baapure sang tumaare baasaa |
lines.english: You are sandalwood, and I am the poor castor oil plant, dwelling close to you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa |
lines.english: Aasaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਧਉ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਰਨਿ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: maadhau satasangat saran tumaaree |
lines.english: O Lord, I seek the Sanctuary of the company of Your Saints;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਅਉਗਨ ਤੁਮੑ ਉਪਕਾਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ham aaugan tuma upakaaree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am worthless, and You are so benevolent. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਮਖਤੂਲ ਸੁਪੇਦ ਸਪੀਅਲ ਹਮ ਬਪੁਰੇ ਜਸ ਕੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: tum makhatool suped sapeeal ham bapure jas keeraa |
lines.english: You are the white and yellow threads of silk, and I am like a poor worm.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੀਐ ਮਾਧਉ ਜੈਸੇ ਮਧੁਪ ਮਖੀਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: satasangat mil raheeai maadhau jaise madhup makheeraa |2|
lines.english: O Lord, I seek to live in the Company of the Saints, like the bee with its honey. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਤੀ ਓਛਾ ਪਾਤੀ ਓਛਾ ਓਛਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਹਮਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaatee ochhaa paatee ochhaa ochhaa janam hamaaraa |
lines.english: My social status is low, my ancestry is low, and my birth is low as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜਾ ਰਾਮ ਕੀ ਸੇਵ ਨ ਕੀਨੀ ਕਹਿ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਚਮਾਰਾ ॥੩॥੩॥
lines.translit: raajaa raam kee sev na keenee keh ravidaas chamaaraa |3|3|
lines.english: I have not performed the service of the Lord, the Lord, says Ravi Daas the cobbler. ||3||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝਹਿ ਚਰਨ ਅਰਬਿੰਦ ਭਵਨ ਮਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: tujheh charan arabind bhavan man |
lines.english: Your lotus feet are the home of my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮੁ ਜਾਇ ਤਉ ਡਰਪੈ ਤੇਰੋ ਜਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: prem jaae tau ddarapai tero jan |1|
lines.english: If I were to lose Your Love, Lord, then Your humble servant would be afraid. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa |
lines.english: Aasaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਾ ਭਇਓ ਜਉ ਤਨੁ ਭਇਓ ਛਿਨੁ ਛਿਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: kahaa bheo jau tan bheo chhin chhin |
lines.english: What would it matter, if my body were cut into pieces?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਨ ਕਰਤ ਪਾਇਓ ਪਾਇਓ ਰਾਮਈਆ ਧਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paan karat paaeo paaeo raameea dhan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Drinking in Your Nectar, I have obtained the wealth of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਪਤਿ ਬਿਪਤਿ ਪਟਲ ਮਾਇਆ ਧਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sanpat bipat pattal maaeaa dhan |
lines.english: Prosperity, adversity, property and wealth are just Maya.
